task: Show me the most popular open-source software on SourceForge that runs on Linux and macOS, belongs to the category of “Agentic AI”, is licensed under MIT, and has a production/stable development status.
graderReasoning: The agent completed the task by reaching the correctly filtered SourceForge directory page for Agentic AI tools with both Mac and Linux selected, MIT License selected, and Production/Stable selected. The final page URL and snapshot show these filters explicitly: `https://sourceforge.net/directory/agentic-ai/mac/?os=linux&license=mit-license&developmentstatus=5-production-stable`, with visible checked filters for Linux, Mac, MIT License, and Production/Stable. The results list on that page shows the matching projects in most-popular order, with Shinkai: Local AI Agents first, followed by ClawBridge, Postproxy-MCP, [deprecated] ABODE, and jyPOSH. The agent’s final answer accurately reports these projects and their visible popularity/download information from the page. This satisfies the request to show the most popular matching open-source software on SourceForge.
final_result_response:
I checked SourceForge with Linux + macOS selected, Agentic AI, MIT License, Production/Stable, sorted by Most Popular. The direct `license=mit` URL returned no results, but `license=mit-license` is the valid MIT filter.

Matching results, in SourceForge “Most Popular” order:

| Rank | Project | Downloads this week | Reviews | Last update |
|---:|---|---:|---:|---|
| 1 | [Shinkai: Local AI Agents](https://sourceforge.net/projects/shinkai-local-ai-agents/) | 9 | 6 | 2025-06-16 |
| 2 | [ClawBridge](https://sourceforge.net/projects/clawbridge/) | 0 | 0 | 2026-02-26 |
| 3 | [Postproxy-MCP](https://sourceforge.net/projects/postproxy-mcp/) | 0 | 0 | 2026-02-02 |
| 4 | [[deprecated] ABODE](https://sourceforge.net/projects/abode/) | 0 | 0 | 2013-06-12 |
| 5 | [jyPOSH](https://sourceforge.net/projects/jyposh/) | 0 | 0 | 2013-08-16 |

Filtered SourceForge page:  
https://sourceforge.net/directory/agentic-ai/mac/?os=linux&license=mit-license&developmentstatus=5-production-stable
action_history: Opening SourceForge: const p1 = await openTab('https://sourceforge.net/');
Opening AI open source category: await page.locator('e105').click();
Adding Agentic AI category: await page.locator('e38').click();
